title: Identify Squared Terms
text: Only $$x$$ is squared (the $$y$$ term is linear). One squared term suggests a parabola.

title: Compare to Standard Form
text: Matches $$\left(x-h\right)^2$$ $$=$$ $$4p(y-k)$$, the standard form of a parabola.

title: Conclude
text: Yes, this is a parabola with vertex at $$(1,-2)$$.
